steps.title: Read the descriptive details
steps.content: The novel is described as having an enormous cast of characters, a complicated, wandering plot, and unusual page numbering that counts backward. These three features all signal one quality: the novel is intricate and many-layered.

steps.title: Find the word that names that quality
steps.content: A brief review cannot fully convey something that is intricate and many-layered — in one word, its complexity.

steps.title: Eliminate the wrong choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'accuracy': nothing in the passage concerns whether the book is factually correct; this is an overreach beyond the details given. ✗
  • Choice B — 'inactivity': contradicts the active, wandering plot and enormous cast. ✗
  • Choice C — 'complexity': directly captures the enormous cast, complicated plot, and unusual structure. ✓
  • Choice D — 'restraint': contradicts the elaborate, sprawling design the passage describes. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
